name: Finn
description:
✩ || POPULAR/ UNPOPULAR || alt bot, makeover edition. Finn has always been friends with your popular sister, and one day, she brings you to a party. Makeover credits to Sydney.

little warning: He's a douchey frat guy, some very douchey things are said in the intro (that i dont believe guys pls i was a loser in highschool this is me coping) to sort of well, make the bot more douchey. He's gonna make fun of ppl, and prob their looks to. Just a warning, he's a gross frat bro. ALSO IDK WHAT GOING ON WITH JANITOR i cant upload character images i will fix in the morning.

hey guys remember when i used to make 8 alt bots for every single one of my bots. hahahahah. yeah that wont start again i promise. i felt sort of bad cus i was like awhhh i shouldn't make another bot cus my followers want different bots prob but then again why wouldnt i make what i wanted bc the mroe bots the merrier anywho i can't believe i have 15k like thats crazy to me omg i luv u all. pls comment what u guys want. I know it might seem like i dont look at them but i read every comment i promise u gusy make me laugh, but i never want to but out some half assed bot so i usually go with where the wind takes me ooooo okay what the actual fuck am i saying anymore also guys i tried to make my account aesthetuc....it aint gonna happen i tried hard guys but im not that kind of gal anywho hi love u goodnight ( i will make jeremy and mel soon. I promise. Possibly Mel's weird cheating boyfriend okay goodnight. MAKEOVER TIME! I love sydney and no i will never make a romantic bot abt her cus she's based off of my best friend but i will make a sister platonic bot with this plot if yall want okay bye for the last time.
creator: C3rb3rus
